Engage - Drive prospects through series of steps to move the sales process forward, consisting of automated and manual emails, calls, video, social touches, and tasks.

Pipeline - Plug the leaks in your pipeline and maintain sales velocity at scale by automating both next steps and record keeping.

Improve - Optimize your sales team performance through A/B testing and metrics that track email effectiveness, call talk time, and drive outcomes.

Key Features:

An account is required to use this extension. You can sign up at https://www.symbo.ai or by contacting team@symbo.ai.

brane lens. | Private Financial Prompt Enhancer
Turn generic AI into an institutional-grade equity analyst. One-click deep reasoning for US and Indian markets.

Brane Lens is the cognitive layer for professional Equity Research. It transforms generic AI tools (ChatGPT, Perplexity) into institutional-grade analysts by injecting scientific frameworks, regulatory context, and valuation models directly into your prompts.

Why Brane Lens?
Generic LLMs are optimized for casual conversation. They hallucinate, miss nuance, and give "middle-of-the-road" answers. Brane Lens forces the underlying model to "think" harder (System 2 thinking), deliberately increasing inference time to perform deep reasoning, cross-verification, and structural formatting before answering you.

Core Capabilities:

⚡ 1-Click High-Signal Synthesis
Instantly restructure unstructured AI chatter into decision-grade formats. Every output includes an Executive Summary, dense Markdown data tables, and a structured logical flow. No more walls of text.

🌍 Adaptive Market Intelligence (US + India)
Context matters. Brane Lens automatically detects your target entity and switches its cognitive framework:

- For US Markets: It prioritizes SEC Filings (10-K/10-Q), Fed Minutes, and Wall Street consensus.
- For Indian Markets: It locks onto BSE/NSE Filings, RBI Policy, and GST Cycles.
- Result: You get precision for Apple *and* nuance for HDFC, without changing a setting.

🛡️ The Anti-Thesis Protocol
Eliminate confirmation bias. Our lens automatically commands the AI to "Red Team" your thesis, identifying structural risks, counter-arguments, and bear-case scenarios you might have missed.

Privacy First:
Brane Lens is a secure passthrough layer. We never use your data to train our models. Your research remains yours. We self-host our orchestration layer to ensure enterprise-grade security and strict data sovereignty.

Who is this for?
Built for Investment Bankers, Equity Research Associates, and serious investors analyzing Global and Emerging Markets who demand Consumable Coverage, not just information.

This powerful Chrome extension revolutionizes how you manage and interact with Google Sheets and Docs, bringing advanced search and…

This powerful Chrome extension revolutionizes how you manage and interact with Google Sheets and Docs, bringing advanced search and link management directly to your browser. Access all your Google Sheets and even publicly shared ones from your dashboard, and search or add content effortlessly. For sheets with Anchor Text and Links columns, you can instantly locate, add, or edit entries. After searching, select an anchor text, and the extension will highlight matching sentences in Google Docs or any webpage, giving you quick, relevant context. If no match is found, our AI-powered tool generates contextually accurate sentences via ChatGPT, which you can then insert directly into Google Docs in Editor or Suggesting mode, or copy for blog use. This extension is your essential tool for seamless, smart document management, enhancing productivity across your workflow.

Save long URLs as memorable to/ shortcuts, organize bookmarks with tags, and open links instantly for faster browsing.

ToLinks turns long URLs into memorable to/ shortcuts so you can open pages instantly, organize with tags, and launch focused tab groups faster.

Stop digging through bookmarks and start navigating by intent.

ToLinks helps you create memorable shortcuts like to/docs, to/billing, and to/dashboard so your most important links are always one quick command away.

What you can do with ToLinks:
- Create custom to/ aliases for any page
- Open links instantly from the address bar
- Use omnibox suggestions while typing
- Organize links with tags, pinning, and smart sorting
- Search by alias, title, URL, or tags
- Switch between compact and detailed views
- Open filtered links together in one tab group
- Generate QR codes for quick sharing
- Import Chrome bookmarks to get started quickly
- Export and upload your link library as HTML backups

Why teams and power users love it:

- Cleaner browser organization without bookmark clutter
- No account required
- Local-first data storage in your browser

Built for Chromium browsers:
Works on Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, Brave, and other Chromium-based browsers with Manifest V3 support.
Build the habit of focus. Block distractions, browse with intention, and set mindful time limits with Intentionality.

Intentionality – Browse with Purpose

Stay focused, beat distractions, and make your browsing intentional.
Intentionality is a productivity extension that helps you pause and reflect before visiting distracting websites. By prompting you to state your reason for visiting, Intentionality empowers you to make conscious choices online, track your habits, and build better digital routines.

⭐ Key Features
- Mindful Browsing:
Before accessing a site, Intentionality asks you to reflect on your purpose—helping you break autopilot habits and stay aligned with your goals.

- Distraction Awareness:
Rate your reason for visiting (from “productive” to “extremely distracted”) and gain insight into your digital behavior.

- Activity Logging:
Securely track your browsing intentions and time spent on distracting sites. Review your activity log to spot patterns and make positive changes.

- Visual Insights:
See charts and summaries of your productivity trends and time spent on various sites.

- Seamless & Private:
All data is stored securely and only accessible to you. Your privacy is our priority.

🚀 How It Works
1. Install the extension.
2. When you try to visit a distracting site, Intentionality prompts you to state your reason and rate your focus.
3. Your activity is logged, and you can review your insights anytime.
4. Use the data to build better habits and take control of your online time.

Who is it for?
- Anyone who wants to be more intentional with their time online
- Students, professionals, and creators seeking to reduce digital distractions
- Anyone looking to build mindful, productive browsing habits

Take charge of your attention. Install Intentionality and start browsing with purpose today!
TestArchitect UI Mapify – Auto-generate CSS/XPath Locator
Instantly auto-generate the most robust locator including Xpath, CSS selector and more for use with TestArchitect products.

Save time by letting TestArchitect UI Mapify instantly suggest the most reliable locator for your inspected web element. The suggestion might be either XPath, CSS selector, By.id, By.name, By.linkText, etc. You can copy & paste these locators into TestArchitect Cloud to build the Interface (TestArchitect Cloud's Page Object Model) for automation testing. 

WHO IS IT FOR? 
* Test automation engineers who specialize in web testing using TestArchitect Cloud.

WHY USE IT?
SMART GEN
* TestArchitect UI Mapify automatically generates the best locator for your web element of interest. The best locator should be [1] short, [2] reliable and [3] easy to understand.
* TestArchitect UI Mapify’s smart algorithm automatically detects and ignores dynamic IDs generated by some front-end frameworks.
* If you don’t want to use the suggested locator or if your project’s convention dictates a certain type of locators, you can manually select the locator type that fits you best.

LOCATOR TEST
* You can evaluate the suggested locator or your customized locator to check whether that locator can uniquely identify the web element of interest.

INTERFACE CODE GEN
* After designing the best locator for your web element, TestArchitect UI Mapify can help you generate the corresponding code snippet. You can paste this code snippet directly into your TestArchitect Cloud project.

NOTES:
* TestArchitect UI Mapify does not track your browsing history in any way, nor does it transmit any data over the internet. All data remains on your local hard disk drive at all times. However, TestArchitect UI Mapify needs "webNavigation" permissions in order to generate locators for elements inside iframes.

WHAT'S NEW
* Version: 1.0
- First release for TestArchitect Cloud users.
- Auto-generate locator for web element.
- Customize or manually build your locator with Locator Test.
- Copy & Paste locator with TestArchitect Cloud's code snippet. 
- Accelerate your Interface (TestArchitect Cloud's Page Object Model) creation



* User Guide: TBU

Navigate safely! Identify bookmarked sites at a glance with TrustedSite Spotlight.

Spot the sites you trust instantly! TrustedSite Spotlight shows you at a glance whether the page you're on is one you've bookmarked before.
  
Phishing and lookalike sites are hard to catch in the moment. TrustedSite Spotlight adds a quiet, always-on visual cue so you can tell a familiar, bookmarked site from an unknown one before you type a password or enter your details.

A thin colored bar at the top of every page and a matching toolbar icon tells you instantly:
 - ✅ Trusted: you've bookmarked this site before
 - ⚠️  Unknown: you haven't, so take a second look

🔒 Why TrustedSite Spotlight?
⭐️ Guards against phishing & scams: Lookalike domains stand out when they don't match a site you've already trusted.
⭐️ 100% private, 100% local: Everything runs on your device. No accounts, no tracking, no data collected or sent. Ever.
⭐️ Always visible, never in the way: A subtle signal on every page, using bookmarking habits you already have. No setup, no learning curve.
⭐️ Make it yours: Customize the bar's colors and thickness, or turn the signal off independently for trusted and unknown sites.

Stop guessing whether you've been to a site before. Let your own bookmarks do the work and browse with a little more confidence.

---
Disclaimer

TrustedSite Spotlight provides an additional layer of reassurance by identifying sites you've previously bookmarked. It is not a definitive verification that a website is safe. A bookmarked site is not guaranteed to be secure, and an unknown site is not necessarily dangerous. Use TrustedSite Spotlight alongside other security measures and always exercise caution online. The developer is not responsible for any mismatch in safety indication. Stay vigilant and browse safely.
Organize your browser tabs into smart AI-labeled groups, restore instantly, sync securely across devices, even offline.

Chrono Session – AI-Powered Tab Management

Chrono Session is a powerful Browser extension that helps you organize, save, and restore sets of browser tabs (called sessions) using intelligent automation and AI. Designed for researchers, developers, and productivity-driven users, it transforms cluttered browsing into a streamlined workspace.

🔑 Key Features
• Smart Tab Session Management
‣ Save all open tabs instantly as a named session
‣ One-click restore of entire sessions anytime
‣ Offline-first support using local storage

• AI-Powered Organization
‣ Gemini AI generates session titles, descriptions, and thumbnails
‣ Auto-categorization of tabs based on content
‣ Global search across saved sessions and URLs

• Secure Cloud Synchronization
‣ Cross-device sync via encrypted cloud storage (Supabase)
‣ Real-time backup and recovery

• Productivity & Analytics
‣ Visual dashboard with time-based session insights
‣ Tab usage trends, focus metrics, and productivity suggestions

• User-Centric Interface
‣ Clean, modern design with light/dark mode
‣ Customizable views, keyboard shortcuts, and session filters

• Privacy First
‣ End-to-end encrypted cloud sessions
‣ No third-party data sharing or tracking
‣ Full control over your session data

🧠 Why Chrono Session?
Unlike traditional tab managers, Chrono Session uses AI and ML to help you recall, organize, and interact with tab groups more intelligently. You get both speed and context — visual previews, smart search, and natural language session querying.

🚀 How to Get Started
Install the extension

Save tabs using the popup or context menu

Open the dashboard to browse or restore sessions

Enable cloud sync to access sessions anywhere

Let AI organize your work for smarter productivity

For documentation, updates, or support, visit:
🔗 https://chronosession.com

Limits daily time spent on Facebook.

Facebook Time Limiter

Short Description
Manage your social media usage by setting daily time limits for websites like Facebook. Get notified when you've reached your limit.

Detailed Description
Website Time Limiter helps you take control of your online habits by tracking and limiting the time you spend on distracting websites. 

Key Features:
• Set custom daily time limits for specific websites
• Focus specifically on managing Facebook usage
• Get notifications when approaching your time limit
• View detailed usage statistics to understand your browsing habits
• Block access to sites once your daily limit is reached
• Easy-to-use interface for quick limit adjustments

Perfect For:
• Students who need to focus on studies without Facebook distractions
• Professionals looking to improve productivity
• Anyone trying to reduce social media screen time
• Parents who want to limit their children's time on certain websites

How It Works:
1. Install the extension and set your desired time limits
2. The extension runs in the background, tracking your active time on specified websites
3. Receive notifications as you approach your limit
4. When your limit is reached, the website is blocked with a friendly reminder
5. Limits reset automatically each day

Privacy and Security:
• All browsing data stays on your device
• No user data is collected or transmitted
• No account registration required
• Lightweight with minimal performance impact

This extension is perfect for maintaining a healthy balance between online activities and real life. Take back control of your time with Website Time Limiter!

Version Notes (Latest Update)
Version 1.2.0 includes significant improvements:

• Fixed issues with Facebook.com compatibility
• Enhanced reliability with improved Chrome runtime validation
• Added specialized handling for Facebook's dynamic page structure
• Improved reconnection mechanism for more consistent tracking
• Added user notifications when extension reloads
• Fixed event listener handling for better performance
• General stability and performance improvements

Technical Details
• Permissions are only used for time tracking and notifications
• Open-source code available on GitHub
• Actively maintained with regular updates

Take control of your online time today!

下载路径规则配置 - Smart Download Organizer
根据域名、文件类型和日期整理您的下载文件 - automatically organizes your downloaded files by domain,file type,and date,keeping your downloads tidy.

## 智能下载管理器 - 自动整理您的下载内容

厌倦了杂乱的下载文件夹？**Smart Download Manager** 自动根据域名、文件类型和日期整理您的下载文件，节省您的时间并保持下载内容井然有序。

### 主要功能：
- **按域名自动分类下载文件**（例如：从 'example.com' 下载的文件保存到 'Example/Documents/'）
- **为特定域名自定义规则**，支持通配符（如 '*.example.com'）
- **按文件类型**（图片、文档、压缩包等）**和日期**（YYYY-MM-DD）**整理**
- **灵活的默认设置**，处理未匹配的下载
- **简洁直观的配置界面**
- **支持多语言**

使用 Smart Download Manager，告别手动整理下载文件的烦恼。立即安装，享受完美有序的下载文件夹！

## Smart Download Manager - Organize Your Downloads Automatically

Tired of messy download folders? **Smart Download Manager** automatically organizes your downloaded files by domain, file type, and date, saving you time and keeping your downloads tidy.

### Features:
- **Automatically categorize downloads by domain** (e.g., downloads from 'example.com' go to 'Example/Documents/')
- **Customizable rules for specific domains**, including wildcard support (e.g., '*.example.com')
- **Organize by file type** (Images, Documents, Archives, etc.) **and date** (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **Flexible default settings** for unmatched downloads
- **Clean and intuitive configuration interface**
- **Supports multiple languages**

With Smart Download Manager, you can say goodbye to manually sorting your downloads. Install now and enjoy a perfectly organized download folder!

Retail Shake - Veille concurrentielle - Pricing

Surveillez les prix de vos concurrents en un clin d’œil, directement depuis votre navigateur.
L’extension Chrome Retail Shake est l’outil indispensable pour les e-commerçants, chefs de produits, category managers et responsables pricing qui souhaitent garder une longueur d’avance sur leur marché.

🎯 Fonctionnalité principale : la veille concurrentielle
En un seul clic, comparez instantanément les prix, promotions et positions tarifaires d’un produit sur l’ensemble de ses revendeurs, sans quitter la page sur laquelle vous naviguez.

Lorsque vous consultez une fiche produit sur un site e-commerce, notre extension détecte automatiquement le produit concerné et vous affiche le meilleur prix disponible, ainsi que tous les autres prix relevés chez vos concurrents.


✅ Ce que vous permet l’extension Retail Shake :

Accès immédiat aux prix concurrents : visualisez les prix pratiqués sur le même produit par tous les autres revendeurs en un clic.

Détection automatique du produit affiché sur la page.

Affichage du meilleur prix trouvé en temps réel.

Optimisation de votre stratégie de pricing grâce à une vision claire et rapide de votre position tarifaire.

Gain de temps : fini les recherches manuelles, vous avez tout sous les yeux, sans changer d’outil ni de page.

Soutien aux décisions marketing : identifiez les écarts de prix, ajustez vos promotions, suivez vos concurrents.


🧠 Pour qui ?
Marques
Distributeurs
E-commerçants
Retailers
Category managers
Équipes pricing & marketing de l’offre

Si vous êtes responsable de votre politique tarifaire, cette extension devient votre alliée du quotidien.


🔐 Conditions d’accès :
L’utilisation de cette extension nécessite un abonnement actif à Retail Shake.

Pas encore client ? Contactez-nous sur www.retailshake.com pour une démonstration ou une version d’essai.

Track and log dynamic DOM changes for SEO analysis

**SEO DOM Logger – Uncover hidden content search engines don’t see**

Created by [SEOWorkflows.com](https://seoworkflows.com)

## What is SEO DOM Logger?

SEO DOM Logger is a lightweight Chrome extension that helps SEO professionals, developers and marketers discover content that search engines may miss. It records DOM (Document Object Model) changes in real time as users interact with a page, revealing links, headings and text that only appear after clicks, hovers, scrolls or other actions.

## Why you need this extension

Modern sites rely on JavaScript to load content after the initial render, which can leave key information invisible to crawlers. SEO DOM Logger solves this by:

- Showing exactly which elements are added after user interactions  
- Providing a clear timeline of when content appears  
- Helping you spot content that needs optimisation for search visibility  

## Key features

**Real-time monitoring**

- Live feed of DOM changes while you browse  
- Tracks which user actions (click, scroll, etc.) trigger each change  
- Running counts of links, headings and text blocks added  

**Focused summary view**

- Filter to SEO-critical elements (links, headings, text)  
- Groups elements by the interaction that revealed them  
- Expandable/collapsible events and one-click export  

**Flexible configuration**

- Minimal performance impact – runs only when you start it  
- Advanced filters for specific change types  
- Persistent settings between sessions and optional display of removed nodes  

**Developer-friendly details**

- Inspect node type, attributes and content  
- Copy individual log entries  
- Resizable, unobtrusive overlay interface  

## Typical use cases

1. Audit accordion or collapsible sections  
2. Analyse infinite-scroll pages to ensure all content is discoverable  
3. Review form validation or error messages that appear only on interaction  
4. Inventory hover-revealed navigation menus  
5. Inspect modal and popup content opened by user clicks  

## Who should use it?

- SEO specialists verifying indexable content  
- Front-end developers fixing JS patterns that hide content  
- Content marketers ensuring valuable copy is crawlable  
- Technical SEO consultants preparing client reports  
- UX researchers mapping content throughout the user journey  

## How it works

1. Click **Start Logging** in the toolbar popup or overlay  
2. Interact with the page as usual  
3. Watch DOM changes appear in real time  
4. Review detailed logs or the Summary tab for grouped SEO elements  

## Permissions explained

- **activeTab**: Observe DOM changes only on the current tab  
- **scripting**: Inject the observer script that records changes  
- **storage**: Save your preferences locally  
- **webNavigation**: Detect page reloads and reset logging state  

## Privacy & security

- Your data stays local – nothing is sent to external servers  
- No tracking of browsing history or personal information  

## Support

Questions or feedback? Email [jasonm@seoworkflows.com](mailto:jasonm@seoworkflows.com) or visit [SEOWorkflows.com](https://seoworkflows.com)

**Discover what search engines might be missing – add SEO DOM Logger to Chrome today.**
Spot hyped news at a glance. (on Hacker News and Reddit)

Hyped News Amplifier spreads Hacker News messages on the page, and rates Reddit messages with up to 5 stars, according to the number of points and comments, conveniently weighted the way you like. At the same time, it preserves the list positions of all the messages, so that they continue drifting down as they age.


-- CONFIGURATION --

Hyped News Amplifier configuration is dead simple. It only needs a number to do its magic. By default the number is set to 50%, meaning that points and comments weigh the same. Open the Options page and customize that number. For example, if you set it to 10% points and 90% comments, then comments will count 9 times more than points.
